title: BuildRoyale.io
instructions: Jump into the battle! WASD to move, 1-6 keys to switch weapons. Mouse to aim/shoot. E to interact/pick up items. Q to enter build mode. Survival of the fittest!

title: Shell Shockers
instructions: Use WASD to move and Mouse to aim and shoot. Press E to switch weapons, R to reload, and Space to jump. Crack your enemies before they crack you!

title: Witchcat
instructions: Navigate the witchcat through the puzzles!

title: Doodle Jump
instructions: Jump up the platforms! Use the left and right arrow keys to move. Avoid falling.

title: Space Invaders 3D
instructions: Navigate your spaceship using the Arrow Keys or WASD. Press Spacebar to shoot aliens! Defeat boss waves to progress and grab glowing power-ups to upgrade your multi-shot lasers.
